steps.t: The stolen ingot might be found within the walls of Gabilazan. Halmur Stoneshaper suggested you seek the stolen ingot there.
The stolen ingot might be inside Hjortur's strongbox, within the walls of Gabilazan. You defeated Hjortur Dourhand and should now search the strongbox…
Halmur Stoneshaper is in the tomb of his ancestor on the hill to the left as you approach the dwarf-keep in the pass of Gabilazan from the north. Halm…
The second strongbox is within the tomb of Halmur Stoneshaper in the pass of Gabilazan. Larus Sharpshard is located in a camp north of High Crag. Afte…
